Who We Are

Built on the
Forge Floor

Celesti Craft is a precision speaker hardware manufacturer based in Morta, Ghaziabad — the industrial heartland of North India's audio components supply chain. We forge, machine, and finish pole plates, T-yokes and top plates for speaker manufacturers across India.

Every part is drop-forged from mild steel billets, then CNC-machined to tolerance and finished in chrome, CED or zinc — giving your speaker motor the magnetic performance and surface quality it demands.

⚙️

Drop Forged

Higher grain density and strength vs. cast parts — better magnetic flux path.

🎯

CNC Machined

Tight tolerances on bore, gap and mating faces ensure consistent voice coil clearance.

📐

Custom Sizes

Coil sizes 1.5"–6", magnet sizes 90–330mm. Share your drawing or sample.

🧾

GST Invoice

Registered manufacturer with proper tax documentation for B2B buyers.

Surface Treatment

Available Finishes

Every part is finished to your specification — choose the coating that suits your application and assembly process.

01
Chrome Finish
Bright electroplated chrome for premium appearance. Excellent corrosion resistance and smooth surface for tight gap tolerances. Preferred for high-end speaker kits.
02
CED Coating
Cathodic electro-deposition gives a uniform matte black finish with superior rust protection. Penetrates recesses and complex geometries that chrome cannot reach evenly.
03
Zinc Plated
Yellow passivated zinc coating provides good corrosion protection at lower cost. Widely used in mid-range speaker kits. RoHS compliant options available on request.
How It's Made

Manufacturing
Process

Every Celesti Craft part follows a disciplined three-stage process — forging builds strength, machining builds precision, and finishing builds durability.

01

Forging

Mild steel billets are drop-forged under high pressure, aligning the grain structure for superior magnetic permeability and mechanical strength compared to cast alternatives.

02

Machining

CNC turning and boring to precise dimensional specs — bore diameter, face flatness, and gap geometry are held to tight tolerances for consistent voice coil alignment every batch.

03

Finishing

Parts are cleaned, treated and plated to your specification: bright chrome, matte CED coating, or yellow zinc passivation. Surface finish is inspected before packing.
